title: Root Insurance Q4 2025 Results: Revenue Surges 21.5% to $397M
text: Root Insurance, a digital auto insurance company, exceeded analyst expectations in Q4 2025. The company achieved revenue of $397 million, up 21.5% year-over-year, surpassing forecasts. Key financial highlights included: Net premiums earned grew 22.6% to $367.3 million. GAAP profit per share significantly exceeded consensus estimates. Combined ratio outperformed expectations. Market capitalization: $896.6 million. The company leverages a data-driven approach using mobile applications and behavioral analytics to price policies based on individual driving patterns. According to the report, the vast majority of its total revenue over the past five years has been derived from net premiums earned, underscoring the importance of underwriting to overall performance. Root has demonstrated substantial compounded annual revenue growth over five years, with accelerating two-year growth rates indicating strengthening market demand for its services.
